headlines.headline: Pacers GM: We believed Ivica Zubac was the right risk
headlines.description: Pacers GM Kevin Pritchard joins "The Pat McAfee Show" to discuss the reasoning behind the trade for Ivica Zubac that saw them lose their pick in the 2026 NBA draft.

headlines.headline: NBA betting tips, DFS picks for Monday: Why to count on Donovan Mitchell in Game 4
headlines.description: André Snellings breaks down Monday's playoff games and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
headlines.description: Here's the latest news and reactions from our NBA insiders, including the latest on Kevin Durant's lingering ankle injury.

headlines.headline: Shams: Bucks 'fully open for business' on trade offers for Giannis
headlines.description: Shams Charania reports that the Bucks are ready to field trade offers for Giannis Antetokounmpo.

headlines.headline: Victor Wembanyama avoids suspension for Naz Reid elbow, will play Game 5
headlines.description: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama will not face any further discipline for elbowing Minnesota's Naz Reid and will play in Game 5 against the Timberwolves in San Antonio, sources told ESPN.

headlines.headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast
headlines.description: From breaking news to the latest intel from around the NBA, here are the top highlights from Brian Windhorst's "The Hoop Collective" podcast.

headlines.headline: Steelers' Boswell now tied with Aubrey as NFL's top-paid kicker
headlines.description: The Steelers have agreed to terms with kicker Chris Boswell on a four-year, $28 million extension, his agency, CAA Football, told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

headlines.headline: Schefter to McAfee: Steelers, Chris Boswell agree to extension
headlines.description: Pat McAfee reacts to Adam Schefter breaking news on Chris Boswell reaching a four-year, $28 million extension with the Steelers.

headlines.headline: Vikings to induct ex-RB Adrian Peterson into ring of honor
headlines.description: Adrian Peterson will enter the Minnesota Vikings' ring of honor this fall, the team announced Monday.

headlines.headline: Bills sign ex-Chiefs pass rusher Mike Danna to 1-year deal
headlines.description: The Bills added a familiar former opponent to the roster, signing outside linebacker Mike Danna to a one-year deal Monday.

headlines.headline: Fantasy football buzz: Which players benefit most from Njoku, Jennings signings?
headlines.description: Discussing the impact on Oronde Gadsden, Kyler Murray, Justin Jefferson, Jordan Addison and others this season.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL free agency: Ranking best players still available
headlines.description: Where could Aaron Rodgers and Deebo Samuel land? Let's stack the top free agents who are still available and looking for new contracts.

headlines.headline: Hurricanes sign forward Mark Jankowski to two-year extension
headlines.description: The Hurricanes have signed F Mark Jankowski, 31, to a two-year extension worth an average of $1.85 million per year.

headlines.headline: Islanders pledge $150K in honor of rookie Shaefer's late mom
headlines.description: The New York Islanders have pledged $150,000 donation to a child support center in honor of the mother of NHL rookie of the year candidate Matthew Schaefer, 18. Jennifer Schaefer died in Feb. 2024 of breast cancer.

headlines.headline: Devils GM Sunny Mehta hires Braden Birch as assistant
headlines.description: The New Jersey Devils have hired Braden Birch as an assistant general manager, the first front office addition by Sunny Mehta since taking over as the team's head of hockey operations.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
headlines.description: It's a crucial Game 4 for Colorado and Minnesota. Plus, highlights from Sunday and updated stat leaders.
